# PreMeet — CEO Daily Briefing
**Date:** 2026-04-22
**Version:** 2.5.1
**Generated by:** Daily remote trigger

---

## What Changed Since Last Activity

- **Last commit: 2026-04-04** — 18 days of silence. No commits since v2.5.1 shipped.
- **v2.5.1 shipped on April 4** — sidepanel redesign complete:
  - Full company data rendering, confidence %, avatar expand/collapse
  - Re-triggers meeting search after sign-in (cards now interactive post-login)
  - Credits corrected to 10 free briefs/month
  - Header slogan added
  - Auth guard preventing unauthenticated API spam
- **Lucide SVG icon system** replacing emoji icons
- **Tab system** live: Overview, Company, Posts, Contact, Research

---

## Current Blockers

| Blocker | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|
| CWS developer account ($5) | Board | Unresolved — 4+ weeks outstanding |
| Privacy policy URL | Board | Unresolved |
| OAuth client_id for CWS submission (PRE-69) | Board | Blocked |
| BrightData API key (`.env` has placeholder `ROTATE_ME`) | Board | Unresolved since PRE-120 (Mar 28) |
| `enrichment_prompts` DB table (TODO in `functions/enrichment-custom/index.ts`) | Engineering | Not started |

**Root cause of stall:** All hard blockers are board-owned. Engineering cannot ship to CWS without the $5 account, OAuth, and privacy policy. Extension itself is feature-complete.

## Engineering Task Status

- **Completed:** sidepanel v2.5.1 — effectively production-ready UI
- **Open TODO:** `PRE-98` — `enrichment_prompts` DB table insert not implemented (stub in `functions/enrichment-custom/index.ts`). Low urgency, no user impact yet.
- **Codebase health:** Clean. One TODO in entire codebase. No FIXME or HACK comments.
- **Two codebases:** `src/` (active, v2.5.1) and `premeet-intel/` (appears empty/removed). Sole active codebase is `src/`.

---

## User Acquisition Progress

- **Target:** 10 real users this week (set 2026-03-24, now 4 weeks overdue)
- **Actual users:** 0 — extension not in CWS, no distribution channel open
- **Assessment:** Zero progress on user acquisition. This is the #1 strategic failure right now.
- **The bottleneck is not engineering** — the extension works. It's the board's $5 payment and admin setup.
- Manual payment collection (pre-Stripe) strategy from PRE-16 has not been acted on.

---

## Top 3 Priorities Today

1. **Board: Unblock CWS submission** — Pay the $5 developer registration fee, register OAuth client ID, stand up a privacy policy URL (a single static page is fine). This is the only thing preventing launch. Engineering is done.

2. **Board: Start selling before the store** — Per PRE-16 minimalist-entrepreneur analysis: reach out to 5 people in your network who have back-to-back calendar meetings. Offer free access. Get feedback. Don't wait for CWS approval (which takes days–weeks). A side-loaded ZIP can go to beta users today.

3. **Engineering: Wire `enrichment_prompts` table (PRE-98)** — Once BrightData key is in `.env`, this is the next engineering unlock. Create the table in Neon and remove the TODO stub so custom prompts are persisted.

---

## Situational Awareness

- CWS target was **end of March 2026** — now 3+ weeks past deadline.
- 18 days with no commits suggests the team is blocked, not idle by choice.
- The product is in the best shape it's been. v2.5.1 is a polished, shippable extension.
- Every day without users is a day without feedback. The risk is building in the wrong direction.
- **Next milestone:** First real user (not a team member) using the extension.
